title: convolvulus pyrrhotrichus
intro: Convolvulus pyrrhotrichus, also known as the silver bindweed or dwarf morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the bindweed family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and wounds due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus pyrrhotrichus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
